name: @aily-project/board-raspberrypi_pico_w
description: The Raspberry Pi Pico W is a compact, low-cost microcontroller board built around the RP2040 chip, featuring a dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ processor clocked at up to 133 MHz, 264 KB of SRAM, and 2 MB of onboard flash memory. It adds built-in 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi (802.11n) and Bluetooth 5.2 (BLE) connectivity via the Infineon CYW43439 wireless module, making it ideal for IoT and wireless projects. With 26 multi-function GPIO pins, support for SPI, I2C, UART, ADC, and PWM, the Pico W offers versatile interfacing options in a small, breadboard-friendly form factor.
author: RaspberryPi
